question: XRP Up or Down - January 20, 4AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.

description:

This market will resolve to "ex-RUBY" if ex-RUBY wins 2 or more maps than 1WIN in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "1WIN".

description:

This market will resolve to "Nuggets" if the Nuggets win the game by 2 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Hornets". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Hornets".

question: Russell Westbrook: Assists O/U 7.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 18 at 9:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Russell Westbrook records more than 7.5 assists during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Russell Westbrook records 7.5 assists or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

question: Map Handicap: Midnight (-1.5) vs Prestige (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Midnight and Prestige in the United21 Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Midnight" if Midnight wins 2 or more maps than Prestige in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Prestige".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Midnight vs Prestige (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Midnight and Prestige in the United21 Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Midnight" if Midnight win the match against Prestige.

This market will resolve to "Prestige" if Prestige win the match against Midnight.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

question: Series: MOUZ Kill Handicap (-5.5) vs Natus Vincere (+5.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Natus Vincere and MOUZ in the ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ secures 6 or more kills than Natus Vincere in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Natus Vincere".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be 6°C or below on January 20?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 20 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: CA Talleres vs. CA Platense: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Primera División Argentina game between CA Talleres and CA Platense, scheduled for January 31 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if CA Talleres and CA Platense combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligaprofesional.ar. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 20, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will the highest temperature in Buenos Aires be 25°C or below on January 20?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 20 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ar/ezeiza/SAEZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligaprofesional.ar. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Map Handicap: BCA (-1.5) vs MOUZ NXT (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between MOUZ NXT and Betclic Apogee Esports in the Roman Imperium Cup Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Betclic Apogee Esports" if Betclic Apogee Esports wins 2 or more maps than MOUZ NXT in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "MOUZ NXT".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 20, 7AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Blackburn Rovers FC and Hull City AFC, scheduled for January 31 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Blackburn Rovers FC and Hull City AFC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
